title: Veggies Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: An addon mod for Farmer's Delight that expand it with a variety of new vegetables, food and structures.
body:
![Veggies Delight Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0048349cd17c03f1d1cb554d18c0c0a5109f76e9.png)
***

# **📜About**

**Veggies Delight** is an add-on for **Farmer's Delight** that introduces a variety of new vegetables and dishes to the game.

***

# 🌾**Features**

*   Adds 7 new vegetables: **Bell Pepper** , **Broccoli** , **Cauliflower , Garlic** , **Sweet Potato** , **Turnip and  Zucchini.**
*   Adds **Dandelion Leaf**, a foragable food item found in **plains** biomes **(Mature Dandelion flowers)**
*   Adds **Depot Houses to village**:
    *   A new structure where it serves as a storage area for various goods.
    *   Each Biome contains unique structure and loot.
*   **Wild Veggies Generation:**
    *   **Bell Pepper** – Found in all **hot biomes** (`#forge:is_hot`), **including deserts.**
    *   **Broccoli** – Found in **birch**, **flower**, **dark**, and **common forests** (temperature: `0.4 – 0.7`)
    *   **Cauliflower** – Grows in **extreme hills**, **taiga**, and **birch forests** (temperature: `0.2 – 0.6`)
    *   **Garlic** – Found in **mega taiga**, **forests**, and **plains** (temperature: `0.3 – 0.8`)
    *   **Sweet Potato** – Found in **extreme hills**, **taiga**, and **birch forests** (temperature: `0.2 – 0.6`)
    *   **Turnip** – Spawns along **rivers** (temperature: `0.2 – 0.89`)
    *   **Zucchini** – Grows in all **hot biomes** (`#forge:is_hot`), **excluding deserts.**
*   Additionally, you can get the **new seeds/veggies** from **villager trades**, **wandering traders** and **most vanilla structures.** (This includes abandoned mineshaft, pillager outposts, villages, simple dungeons and shipwrecks)

🔧 The mod is also fully compatible with **Botany**, **Create**, **CreateAdditions**, **Diet**, and **Serene Seasons** **(and a lot of other mods)**

**Use JEI** and **Appleskin** for a better experience.

***

# ☕ Support Veggies Delight! ❤️

***

# 🔒 Permissions

Modpacks: You are welcome to include Veggies Delight in any public or private modpack. Please provide credit and a link back to the mod’s official page.

**Modifications:** You may create addons or modifications to Veggies Delight as long as they are non-commercial and credit the original mod. If you plan to distribute modified versions, please ensure they are clearly labeled as unofficial.

**Commercial Use:** Veggies Delight is not to be used for commercial purposes. This includes selling the mod, offering it as part of a paid service, or using it in monetized content without permission.

**Attribution:** If you feature Veggies Delight in videos, streams, or other content, please 


Feel free to suggest new ideas or report any bugs on the GitHub repository, or contact me directly.
